Description: RISC-V SoC QFN64 placeholder footprint - derive from vendor pkg drawing before fab
Reset supervisor 3.08V threshold active-low push-pull SOT-23-5
Debug header 10-pin 1.27mm dual-row SMD ARM Cortex / RISC-V JTAG
USB Type-C receptacle power-only vertical SMD
Inductor 1uH ISAT=3A DCR<=50mΩ SRR4018 (buck output inductor)
PTC resettable fuse 0.5A hold 1A trip VBUS protection
Tactile reset button 6x6mm SMD momentary NO
U2 EN pin pull-up to VIN_5V
J1 VTref series resistor (VDD_1V8 to pin 1)
J1 nRESET series resistor (open-drain probe safe)
J3 CC1 pull-down to GND (UFP sink mode)
J3 CC2 pull-down to GND (UFP sink mode)
Test point CLK_24M 1.8V CMOS T-tap 1nF AC-block
